items.title: Catholic Democrats say ICE is violating God's will with deportation surge
items.description: Catholic Democrats in Congress say ICE is violating God's precepts in carrying out President Trump's mass deportation mission.

items.title: Trump threatens death penalty for Nancy Guthrie's kidnappers
items.description: President Trump on Monday called for those responsible for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie's disappearance to return her unharmed or face the death penalty.
